Klasse TSPProblem

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp.TSPProblem
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
GAProblem<Integer>
public class TSPProblem extends Object implements GAProblem<Integer>
Implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem for the Genetic Algorithm.

This implementation assumes a standard Round Trip, where the salesman must return to the starting city to complete the path.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • TSPProblem

      public TSPProblem(TSPGAConfig config)
      Constructs a TSPProblem.
      Parameter:
      config - the configuration

  • Methodendetails

    • loadData

      public void loadData(List<String[]> rawData)
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: GAProblem
      Loads raw CSV or text data specific to the problem domain. The input is provided as a list of string arrays, typical of CSV output. Implementing classes must parse the data (e.g., city coordinates for TSP, item weights for Knapsack, raw cipher text for Cryptanalysis) and configure the problem state accordingly.

      If the data is empty or malformed, a RuntimeException should be thrown.

      Angegeben von:
      loadData in Schnittstelle GAProblem<Integer>
      Parameter:
      rawData - A list containing the rows parsed from a data source.

    • getFitnessFunction

      public FitnessFunction<Integer> getFitnessFunction()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: GAProblem
      Retrieves the strictly configured fitness function representing the mathematical goal of this specific problem domain.

      Constraint: Must return a valid FitnessFunction<T> initialized with the specific constraints mapped from loadData. Returning a null evaluator will crash the algorithm upon the first evolutionary evaluation pass.

      Angegeben von:
      getFitnessFunction in Schnittstelle GAProblem<Integer>
      Gibt zurück:
      The properly instantiated FitnessFunction evaluator.

    • getInitialPopulation

      public Population<Integer> getInitialPopulation(int populationSize)
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: GAProblem
      Generates a fully randomized initial population of the required data structure to seed generation 0.

      Constraint: The implementation must generate exactly populationSize valid individuals. Each individual must possess chromosomes built within the strict mathematical boundaries of the problem (e.g., Sudoku must preserve fixed cells, TSP must generate a valid permutation containing all cities).

      Angegeben von:
      getInitialPopulation in Schnittstelle GAProblem<Integer>
      Parameter:
      populationSize - The requested integer size of the population to generate. Must be > 0.
      Gibt zurück:
      The newly initialized Population<T> containing valid structural permutations.

    • getPreview

      public String getPreview(Individual<Integer> individual)
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: GAProblem
      Translates a deeply nested chromosome back into a short, human-readable preview string.

      Used exclusively to build the single-line telemetry output emitted every N generations. Constraint: This formatting logic must be extremely light. It must not throw StackOverflowErrors when resolving deeply nested trees (like in Symbolic Regression). It should return a condensed subset if the decoded structure exceeds console limits.

      Angegeben von:
      getPreview in Schnittstelle GAProblem<Integer>
      Parameter:
      individual - The targeted individual to unpack and preview.
      Gibt zurück:
      A short, robust String explicitly denoting the individual's evaluated genetic state.
